executivePositions.title: Chief Operating Officer
executivePositions.location: Remote with regular in-person leadership meetings

benefits.academyCertifications: All certifications provided at no cost

requirements.experience: 5+ years in operations management or similar leadership role

executivePositions.description: The Chief Operating Officer oversees day-to-day operations across all five subsidiary entities. This role coordinates between department leads, ensures efficient resource allocation, and drives operational excellence throughout the organization.
responsibilities: Direct supervision of Operations Manager, HR Lead, QA/QC Lead, Purchasing Lead, and Platform Administrator
Develop and implement operational policies and procedures
Monitor organizational performance metrics and KPIs
Manage capacity planning and resource allocation
Ensure alignment between entity operations and organizational strategy

executivePositions.title: Executive Director
executivePositions.entity: LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society, Inc.

benefits.academyCertifications: All certifications provided at no cost

requirements.experience: 3+ years in nonprofit leadership or program management

executivePositions.description: The Executive Director provides overall leadership for the 508(c)(1)(a) faith-based organization, ensuring program excellence, grant compliance, and community impact. This role is essential for nonprofit credibility with funders and partners.
responsibilities: Grant compliance and reporting for nonprofit programs
Direct supervision of Education Director and Outreach Coordinator
Represent organization at community events and with partners
Develop and maintain relationships with funders
executivePositions.notes: Required for nonprofit credibility with funders

filledExecutivePositions.title: Chief Executive Officer / Matriarch
filledExecutivePositions.entity: Calea Freeman Family Trust / The L.A.W.S. Collective, LLC
filledExecutivePositions.description: Vision and strategic direction for all entities. Final authority on major decisions. Trust governance and succession planning.

filledExecutivePositions.title: Chief Financial Officer
filledExecutivePositions.description: Financial strategy and planning across all entities. Budget development and monitoring. Grant financial management and compliance. Token economy oversight.
responsibilities: Financial strategy and planning across all entities

filledExecutivePositions.title: Chief Education & Training Officer
crossEntityScope: LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society, Inc.
filledExecutivePositions.description: The Chief Education & Training Officer provides strategic leadership for all education, training, and professional development initiatives across all subsidiary entities. This executive role oversees curriculum development, instructor management, certification programs, and educational partnerships while leveraging expertise in both education and criminal justice.
responsibilities: Strategic oversight of all education and training programs across entities
Academy curriculum development and quality assurance
Training program development for LAWS, LLC platform
Education liaison coordination with Real-Eye-Nation media
Student progress tracking and outcome measurement

qualifications.experience: 5+ years in education leadership or training management

additionalStipends.description: Advisory support leveraging Criminal Justice expertise

stipendPolicy.description: Stipends are additional compensation provided to employees who take on duties beyond their primary role. Stipends are separate from base salary and may be adjusted based on workload and organizational needs.
stipendPolicy.eligibility: Any employee may receive stipends for additional cross-entity or specialized duties approved by leadership.

ranges.examples: Pillar leadership, liaison roles, advisory functions
Department oversight, specialized expertise, executive advisory

stipendPolicy.paymentSchedule: Stipends are paid monthly as part of regular payroll or quarterly based on agreement.
stipendPolicy.reviewFrequency: Stipend assignments are reviewed annually or when role responsibilities change.

positions.title: HR Department Lead

benefits.academyCertifications: All certifications provided at no cost

requirements.experience: 3+ years in HR, recruiting, or people management

positions.description: The HR Department Lead builds and maintains the human capital infrastructure across all five subsidiary entities. This role oversees talent acquisition, onboarding, training coordination, performance management, and employee relations.
responsibilities: Design and manage comprehensive onboarding programs
Coordinate training paths with Academy leadership
Serve as first point of contact for workplace concerns
Maintain HR records and ensure compliance

positions.title: QA/QC Department Lead

benefits.academyCertifications: All certifications provided at no cost

requirements.experience: 3+ years in quality assurance, compliance, or process management

positions.description: The QA/QC Department Lead establishes and maintains quality standards across all subsidiary entities. This role ensures deliverables meet organizational standards and grant compliance requirements are satisfied.
responsibilities: Define quality criteria and acceptance standards
Develop and maintain Standard Operating Procedures

positions.title: Purchasing Department Lead
positions.location: Remote with vendor site visits as needed

requirements.experience: 2+ years in purchasing, procurement, or supply chain

positions.description: The Purchasing Department Lead manages procurement operations across all subsidiary entities. This role handles vendor relationships, cost control, inventory tracking, and grant compliance for purchasing activities.
responsibilities: Provide cost estimates for grant proposals
Ensure purchases comply with grant requirements
Report purchasing metrics and cost savings

positions.title: Operations Manager

requirements.experience: 3+ years in operations, project management, or coordination

positions.description: The Operations Manager ensures smooth day-to-day operations across all subsidiary entities. This role coordinates workflows, monitors business systems, identifies bottlenecks, and provides support to team members.
responsibilities: Provide administrative support to team members
Track operational KPIs and report to leadership

positions.title: Outreach Coordinator
positions.entity: LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society, Inc.

requirements.experience: 2+ years in community outreach, event planning, or nonprofit work

positions.description: The Outreach Coordinator connects the organization with the broader community through events, partnerships, and relationship building. This role plans community events, builds partner relationships, and coordinates volunteers.
responsibilities: Coordinate with Media team on event promotion

positions.title: Content Creator / Media Assistant
positions.description: The Content Creator supports the media production mission by creating social media content, documenting events, editing videos, and writing copy for marketing materials.
responsibilities: Document events and programs through photo/video
Edit videos for tutorials and promotional content
Write copy for posts, emails, and marketing materials
Support live streaming and virtual events

positions.title: Academy Instructor / Curriculum Developer
positions.entity: LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society, Inc.

benefits.academyCertifications: All certifications provided at no cost

requirements.experience: Expertise in at least one subject area

positions.description: The Academy Instructor delivers educational content and develops new courses for the LuvOnPurpose Academy. This role teaches courses, creates curriculum, develops assessments, and tracks student progress.
responsibilities: Deliver courses in assigned subject areas
Design new courses based on organizational needs
Create assessments and track student progress

positions.title: Grant Writer / Proposal Specialist

requirements.experience: 2+ years in grant writing or proposal development

positions.description: The Grant Writer identifies funding opportunities and writes compelling proposals to secure grants for all subsidiary entities. This role researches opportunities, develops narratives, creates budgets, and manages deadlines.
responsibilities: Research grant opportunities matched to each entity
Develop budgets with Purchasing and Finance
Track outcomes and prepare progress reports
Coordinate with program staff for requirements

positions.title: Platform Administrator

requirements.experience: 2+ years in IT administration or technical support

positions.description: The Platform Administrator maintains and improves the technology infrastructure of the organization. This role monitors system health, manages user accounts, implements new features, and ensures security.
responsibilities: Implement new features as platform grows

positions.title: Community Programs Coordinator

requirements.experience: 2+ years in program management or community development

positions.description: The Community Programs Coordinator develops and manages programs based on the L.A.W.S. framework (Land, Air, Water, Self) that help community members reconnect with their roots, gain knowledge, find balance, and discover purpose.
responsibilities: Design programs based on L.A.W.S. principles

administrativeSupportPositions.title: HR Administrative Support

requirements.experience: 1+ years in administrative or HR support role

administrativeSupportPositions.description: The HR Administrative Support provides day-to-day administrative assistance to the HR Department. This role handles scheduling, document management, candidate coordination, and employee record maintenance.
responsibilities: Schedule interviews and coordinate candidate communications
Maintain employee files and HR documentation
Process onboarding paperwork for new hires

administrativeSupportPositions.title: QA/QC Administrative Support

requirements.experience: 1+ years in administrative or quality support role

administrativeSupportPositions.description: The QA/QC Administrative Support assists the Quality Department with documentation, tracking, and compliance activities. This role maintains quality records, tracks audit findings, and supports process improvement initiatives.
responsibilities: Track audit findings and corrective actions

administrativeSupportPositions.title: Purchasing Administrative Support

requirements.experience: 1+ years in administrative, purchasing, or accounting support

administrativeSupportPositions.description: The Purchasing Administrative Support assists with procurement operations including order processing, vendor communications, and inventory tracking. This role ensures accurate records and timely processing of purchases.
responsibilities: Communicate with vendors on orders and deliveries
Maintain vendor files and contact information
Track inventory levels and reorder points
Coordinate with Finance on payment processing

administrativeSupportPositions.title: Operations Administrative Support

requirements.experience: 1+ years in administrative or operations support

administrativeSupportPositions.description: The Operations Administrative Support provides day-to-day assistance to the Operations team. This role handles scheduling, project tracking, communications, and general administrative tasks to keep operations running smoothly.
responsibilities: Support team members with administrative tasks

administrativeSupportPositions.title: Education Administrative Support
administrativeSupportPositions.entity: LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society, Inc.

benefits.academyCertifications: All Academy certifications at no cost
benefits.careerGrowth: Path to Academy Instructor or Education Coordinator

requirements.experience: 1+ years in administrative or education support

administrativeSupportPositions.description: The Education Administrative Support assists the Academy with student services, course administration, and certification processing. This role ensures smooth operations of educational programs and excellent student experience.
responsibilities: Respond to student inquiries and support requests
Support curriculum updates and course launches

standard.name: Standard Benefits Package
includes: All Academy certifications at no cost
Token earnings based on role metrics

grantCompliant.name: Grant-Compliant Benefits Package
grantCompliant.description: For positions funded by grants requiring traditional benefits
grantCompliant.notes: Specific benefits vary by grant requirements

remoteWorkSupport.name: Remote Work Support Package
includes: Monthly utilities stipend ($75-150/month for internet and electricity)
Variable travel reimbursement (mileage, lodging, per diem for required travel)

outreachProfessional.name: Outreach & Professional Appearance Package
outreachProfessional.description: For public-facing and outreach positions that serve as organizational representatives
outreachProfessional.justification: Staff serve dual roles as outreach representatives and organizational ambassadors, requiring professional appearance for community events, partner meetings, and media appearances.

softwareSubscriptions.name: Software Subscriptions Package
softwareSubscriptions.description: Essential software tools for remote work productivity

creative.note: Adobe Creative Cloud for media roles

systemMaintenance.name: System Maintenance & IT Infrastructure
systemMaintenance.note: Budget as single organizational line item, not per-employee. Can also be included in indirect costs if organization has negotiated indirect rate.

grantBudgetSummary.description: Estimated annual costs per employee for grant budgeting purposes

utilitiesStipend.description: Monthly internet and electricity support for remote work

equipmentProvision.description: Laptop, phone, software licenses - one-time with annual maintenance

travelReimbursement.description: Variable based on role - mileage at federal rate, lodging, per diem

softwareSubscriptions.description: Productivity suite, communication, project management, role-specific tools, security

totalPerEmployeeRange.note: First year includes one-time equipment and setup costs. Does NOT include organizational IT infrastructure.

systemMaintenance.description: Cloud hosting, backup, IT support contract, domain/email, security monitoring - budgeted at organizational level, not per-employee
